name: workflow-llm-output-mode-clean-contract
title: LLM 输出模式干净化：严格文本/JSON 二选一
description: 清理工作流 LLM 节点输出契约，移除 llm_output/text 等历史兼容字段。文本模式只暴露并产出 response；JSON 模式只暴露并产出 json_output 以及显式配置的 JSON 字段。前端、保存归一化、后端执行、最终回复提取和测试必须围绕唯一契约实现，不再为旧工作流做兼容兜底。
creator: zj669
notes: Created to clean up LLM node output contract without historical compatibility. The task explicitly requires text mode to expose/produce only response, JSON mode to expose/produce only json_output plus explicitly configured JSON fields, and removal of llm_output/text fallback paths. Implemented JSON field definition flow: frontend JSON mode now edits explicit field name, type, and field description; graph conversion preserves node outputSchema into the domain node; LLM execution injects those JSON fields and descriptions into the system prompt as a required JSON example; JSON mode returns only json_output plus those explicit fields, fails when configured fields are missing, and text mode returns only response. Latest tightening requires JSON mode to define at least one user field with a valid field name and non-empty description before save/publish or model execution; switching back to text mode drops JSON custom fields so downstream references cannot point at nonexistent text-mode outputs. Scheduler and SSE finish extraction now read response/json_output instead of old text aliases, and SSE serializes structured json_output as JSON text instead of Java Map.toString(). Local backend was rebuilt/installed and restarted with the previous CSDN_COOKIE preserved; health check is UP.
